# Copilot Instructions for Explorer

All agent instructions, coding conventions, architecture documentation, and task workflows are maintained in [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) at the repository root. That file is the **source of truth**.

When working on this project:
1. Read `AGENTS.md` for coding conventions, architecture overview, and common task workflows
2. Read the `README.md` in the relevant source directory for component-specific documentation
3. Follow the documentation maintenance rules in `AGENTS.md` — keep README.md files in sync with code changes
